disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden onset of a racing, pounding heartbeat about 30 minutes ago, immediately following a stressful interpersonal argument
trigger_question_examples: When and how did this start?
Was there anything going on just before it began?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started all of a sudden about half an hour ago, right after a really upsetting argument. My heart just took off and started pounding.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Fine trembling of both hands and an overwhelming sense that something terrible is about to happen
trigger_question_examples: What else are you noticing in your body?
How are you feeling in yourself right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My hands won't stop shaking and I've got this horrible feeling of dread, like something awful is going to happen.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Mild shortness of breath accompanying the episode
trigger_question_examples: Are you having any trouble with your breathing?
Do you feel short of breath?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I do feel a bit short of breath, but I can still talk in full sentences.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Continuous checking of her own pulse and hypervigilant focus on her heart, with longstanding health anxiety
trigger_question_examples: How are you coping with worry about your health generally?
Are you finding yourself checking your pulse a lot?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Honestly I keep taking my pulse over and over — I do worry a lot about my heart and it winds me up even more.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Known low-TSH-with-normal-thyroid-hormone status and positive thyroid antibodies, not on antithyroid medication or a beta-blocker
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any medical conditions?
Are you on any regular medications?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've got some thyroid antibodies and my TSH blood test was low but the hormones themselves were normal. I'm not on any thyroid tablets or heart tablets.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Denies central, crushing or pressure-like chest pain and denies any pain spreading to the jaw, neck or arm
trigger_question_examples: Is there any tight, crushing or heavy pain in the centre of your chest?
Does any of the discomfort spread to your jaw, neck or arm?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, it's not a crushing pain and nothing is spreading to my jaw or arm — it's more of a pounding, racing feeling.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Denies fainting, blacking out or feeling about to collapse
trigger_question_examples: Have you fainted or felt like you were about to black out?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't fainted or passed out — I feel wired and frightened, not faint.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Denies fever, and denies feeling confused, agitated to the point of delirium, or drenched in sweat
trigger_question_examples: Do you have a fever or feel hot and sweaty and confused?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fever, I'm not confused, and I'm not pouring with sweat — just shaky and panicky.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Cannot reliably say whether the fast heartbeat is regular or irregular, and has no ECG or medical device to check the rhythm
trigger_question_examples: Does the heartbeat feel steady and regular, or is it jumping about irregularly?
Do you have any way of recording your heart's rhythm?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I honestly can't tell if it's regular or not — it just feels fast and pounding. I don't have anything to record the rhythm, only my watch that shows a number.
